IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10247517.pdf)
SUMMARY: Possesses an extensive background in Information Technology Management, with a Masters of Science degree and multiple certifications. Excels in planning, implementing, and evaluating systems, infrastructure, and staffing for complex initiatives.

JOB TITLE: Information Technology Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 04/2013 - Present
DESCRIPTION: Managed application database/hardware systems, evaluated and implemented hardware/software, maintained infrastructure, performed disaster recovery planning, administered licenses, defined IT procedures, created user accounts, inspected employee computers, coordinated special projects, enhanced network performance.

JOB TITLE: Network Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/1987 - 06/2012
DESCRIPTION: Improved LAN performance by 1,000%, led a team of network support specialists, configured and maintained Nortel and Juniper networks, reduced support requests, cut equipment costs, boosted productivity through thin client solution deployment.
